infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app needs your location to show your position on the map, detect unsafe zones, and send SOS alerts.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app needs your location to show your position on the map, detect unsafe zones, and send SOS alerts.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Tourist Safety to use your location for maps, geo-fencing, and emergency alerts.
